arts.ttl: Boost for Wolves as player steps up injury recovery – Almost ready to return to training
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers could soon be set for a boost, with Enso Gonzalez ready to return to first team training. That’s according to journalist Christian Martin, who reports that Gonzalez is set for a return and will flourish for the club moving forwards. arts.ttl: Everton's new owners make statement with Leeds appointment and transfer changes
arts.sum: Everton are about to embark upon a new era as they leave Goodison Park at the end of the season, with the club's new owners implementing changes in the boardroom as well

arts.ttl: Liverpool striker was signed as 'experiment' before Everton rejected shock transfer approach

arts.sum: Munetsi had a problem in the last game, but he is ready to help the team. “This is a very important moment of the season, and I don't believe in a team that is built around one player.

arts.ttl: Angus Kinnear named new Everton CEO as Kevin Thelwell and Richard Kenyon departures confirmed
arts.sum: The Friedkin Group have confirmed the departures of director of football Kevin Thelwell and chief commercial and communications officer Richard Kenyon and the appointment of Leeds United CEO Angus Kinnear

arts.ttl: Everton to appoint Leeds' Kinnear as chief executive
arts.sum: Everton will appoint Angus Kinnear as their new chief executive, with the Leeds United CEO beginning his role on 1 June.

arts.ttl: Nathan Patterson sent warning by David Moyes as Everton boss tells ex Rangers star to 'step up'
arts.sum: The full back has been ravaged with injury problems since he joined the Toffees from Rangers for an initial fee of £11.5million

arts.ttl: David Moyes sticking to Everton script but Finch Farm hasn't felt like this in years
arts.sum: Everton FC correspondent Joe Thomas with the latest from Finch Farm after David Moyes' pre-Wolves press conference

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano Shares Update as the Friedkin Group Line up Everton Appointments
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano has suggested Everton are set to make changes to their recruitment team with Kevin Thelwell to depart.

arts.ttl: 'I’d be having a look' - Everton legend Peter Reid would take transfer chance on £72m Man United flop
arts.sum: Everton legend Peter Reid reckons Manchester United striker Rasmus Hojlund would be worth trying to prise away from Old Trafford
